consent.consent_scope: Household and individual interviews; biomarker and specimen collection; informed consent obtained per DHS protocol and host-country ethical approval; data for research and program planning.
consent.consent_language: English, Chichewa (local languages per DHS protocol)

permitted_use.use_restrictions: DHS Terms of Use: registration required; project-specific use; no commercial use; no redistribution of microdata; no identification of individuals, households, or enumeration areas; results must not identify communities or individuals. Sensitive data (e.g. HIV, GPS) may require additional agreement.

provenance.collector_org: The DHS Program (ICF); National Statistical Office of Malawi

audit.notes: Governance record filled for DSA 2026 workshop application. Strong consent and use governance; ideal example for health + African context. 22,414 households; women 15-49, men 15-54; biomarkers (anthropometrics, anemia, malaria, water quality).
